description: Capability-gap registry — tracks things LACP cannot do because it delegates to provider runtimes. When hard_blockers >= 5, reconsider runtime architecture.

gaps.name: No compaction control
gaps.description: LACP cannot trigger or control compaction strategies (microcompact, snip, auto, collapse). Can only hint at /compact via systemMessage. Provider owns the compaction decision.
gaps.workaround: Context pressure hints in stop hook suggest /compact. Handoff artifacts persist state across resets.

gaps.name: No tool result budgeting
gaps.description: Large bash outputs fill context window. LACP cannot truncate or budget tool results before they enter the provider's context. Provider controls tool result handling.
gaps.workaround: None. PostToolUse hooks fire after the result is already in context.

gaps.name: No mid-loop tool interception
gaps.description: PreToolUse hooks can block tools but cannot modify tool inputs or reorder tool execution. Cannot implement concurrency classification (read=parallel, write=serial) from outside the loop.
gaps.workaround: PreToolUse blocks dangerous tools. Cannot optimize execution order.

gaps.name: No streaming backpressure
gaps.description: When the TUI renders slower than the model streams, LACP cannot signal the provider to slow down. Memory grows unbounded in long streaming turns.
gaps.workaround: TUI buffers and renders async. Not a problem in practice yet.

gaps.name: No per-error-class retry strategy
gaps.description: Provider SDK handles retries generically. LACP cannot implement different strategies for 429 vs 529 vs 400 vs 401 like Claude Code's 823-line retry system.
gaps.workaround: Provider SDK max_retries=10 with generic backoff. TUI-level fallback on persistent 429.

gaps.name: No session continuity across provider switches
gaps.description: When switching from Claude to Codex mid-session, conversation history format is incompatible. No portable session format exists. SMS episodes are provider-agnostic but conversation state is not.
gaps.workaround: Handoff artifacts capture summary but not full conversation. User must start fresh.

summary.verdict: Stay wrapper. 3 hard blockers < 5 threshold. Revisit when count reaches 5.
